FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f7990a931a0>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-08T19:08:26Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-08T19:06:43Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-08T19:08:26Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-08T19:06:43Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/08 19:10:11.837919104 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/08 19:10:11.837926748 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838005144 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838006417 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838025552 {
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838026504 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838038446 new <- list()
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838039288 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838052001 new$width <- width
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838052753 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838066378 new$height <- height
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838067260 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838080224 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838081066 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838094140 new$title <- title
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838094911 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838107875 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838108717 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838123835 new$version <- version
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838124687 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838151106 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838152158 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838165703 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838166645 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838180320 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838181102 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838193204 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838194026 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838206880 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838207731 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838253186 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838254408 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838277361 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838278182 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838319329 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838320381 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838334848 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838335599 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838352911 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838353853 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838368270 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838369102 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838387295 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838388087 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838404577 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838405529 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838421744 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838424289 "default"))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838450047 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838451149 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838468802 }
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838469754 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838486986 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838487877 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838505340 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838506202 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838587267 }
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838589732 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838610030 }
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838611252 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838626771 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838627743 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838650325 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838651347 domain = NA)
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838667116 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838668078 }
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838685260 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838686071 old$family <- family
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838704806 }
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838705588 version <- old$version
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838721287 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838722048 "2.0")
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838741765 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838742717 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838762343 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838763325 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838777912 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838778713 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838794092 domain = NA)
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838794894 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838809811 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838810853 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838837758 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838840533 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838903150 invisible()
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838911776 }

2026/05/08 19:10:11.838424289 "default"))
2026/05/08 19:10:11.838450047 old$encoding <- enc

2026/05/08 19:10:11.838610030 }
